name: @ds/lint-guard-tests
description: Fixtures-based exit-code harness for the tools/lint/*.ts AI-discipline guards (#286, extended #293). Each spec spawns the REAL guard via tsx and asserts its exit code (0 pass / 1 fail) through injectable seams — LINT_FIXTURE_ROOT (FS scan), LINT_GH_FIXTURE_DIR (canned gh JSON), LINT_MEMORY_FILE (auto-memory). Runs in CI via `turbo run test` (the `unit` job) — no new CI job. See README.md.
